default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore technical content review processes and potential collaboration with Madison, a technical writer experienced in data engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Technical content creation/review is time-consuming (10-20 hrs writing, 2-5 hrs reviewing) and expensive ($0.75-$1/word)](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Scaling technical content production is challenging due to the expertise required and difficulty in automating the process](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [GrowthX is considering building a network of domain experts for content review, but cost may be prohibitive at scale](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Madison's approach: research, hands-on coding, and leveraging personal expertise to identify content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

## Topics

### Technical Content Creation Challenges

  - [AI-generated content often lacks technical accuracy, especially with code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Writers without technical backgrounds struggle to identify errors or outdated information](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Reviewing documentation and testing code is crucial but time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Technical expertise (e.g., 10 years of experience) is a significant factor in content quality](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Madison's review process: 2-5 hours per article, depending on setup requirements](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Involves thorough documentation review and hands-on code testing](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Charges same rate for reviewing as writing ($0.75-$1 per word)](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Value comes from unique skill set, experience, and perspective, not just time spent](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### GrowthX's Content Strategy

  - [Aiming to produce 20-30 technical articles per week for clients](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Considering hiring domain experts for each technical area to review content](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Challenges in scaling this approach due to high costs and limited availability of experts](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Exploring balance between SEO-driven content and providing genuine value to readers](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Madison's Writing Approach

  - [Focuses on making technical concepts approachable and easy to understand](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Identifies gaps in existing documentation and addresses real user needs](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Combines company documentation with external resources and personal insights](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Balances client-requested topics with self-generated ideas based on market value](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [GrowthX may consider referrals or partnerships for highly technical content needs](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Madison open to potential collaboration, typically works with direct clients](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [GrowthX recognizes the need to manage client expectations regarding technical content capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to evaluate the feasibility of offering technical content review services](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Consider building a network of domain experts for different technical areas](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Explore potential partnership or referral opportunities with Madison for data engineering content](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Meet with Ari (former Airbyte DevRel) to discuss technical content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/JrQHD_7kQsF56tqW7Lherazx4nmztgJm?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
